name: Queens center pawnbrokers
description_short: Queens Center Pawn Brokers buys, sells, and offers collateral-based loans on luxury watches, gold, diamonds, and jewelry in Elmhurst, NY. Operating 35+ years with a focus on competitive pricing and quick transactions.
description_long:
Queens Center Pawn Brokers is a pawn shop located in Elmhurst, Queens (91-14b 59th Avenue) that has operated in the luxury goods business for over 35 years. The company specializes in high-value items including watches, gold, diamonds, silver, and antiques. They position themselves as a collateral-based lending alternative for customers who need cash but prefer not to permanently sell their valuables.

The company offers three primary services: buying luxury items for cash, selling authenticated jewelry and watches from their inventory, and providing collateral-based loans (pawning) where customers can leverage their valuables for immediate funds. They advertise a "Highest Cash Offer Guarantee" and claim to complete transactions in under 10 minutes. Their online store features luxury watches (including Rolex models priced up to $100,000) and high-karat gold items. They offer a promotional code for $100 off purchases and emphasize their price competitiveness.

Queens Center Pawn Brokers distinguishes itself through claims of authenticity ("100% genuine" merchandise), extensive inventory of luxury items, and a retail presence combined with online sales. They report that over 90% of their business comes from repeat customers or referrals. The company maintains direct contact channels (phone: 718-639-3880, email) and advertises availability for special requests. Their messaging emphasizes serving customers across all price points ("$50 or $50,000").

As a pawn shop, this business serves customers seeking immediate liquidity without credit checks or traditional lending requirements. However, collateral-based loans carry inherent risks including potential loss of items if unable to repay, and customers should verify actual loan terms, interest rates, and repayment conditions directly with the shop, as these critical details are not disclosed on their website.
pros: 35+ years operating history in luxury goods, suggesting established reputation and longevity
Advertises "Highest Cash Offer Guarantee" for items being sold or pawned
Fast transaction time: claims customers are "in & out in less than 10 minutes"
No credit checks required for collateral-based loans (pawn transactions)
Large inventory of authenticated luxury items including Rolex watches and high-karat gold jewelry
Reports 90% of business from repeat customers and referrals, indicating customer satisfaction
Online store with e-commerce capability plus physical location for in-person transactions
cons: No APR, interest rates, or loan terms disclosed on website—critical borrowing costs are opaque
No information about redemption deadlines, fees, or what happens to unredeemed collateral
Pawn transactions carry risk of permanent loss of valuables if unable to repay the loan
Prices of featured items appear extremely high (up to $200,000) with limited product details or authentication transparency
Website contains multiple spelling/grammar errors ('ANTIUQES,' inconsistent capitalization), suggesting potential quality control issues
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own luxury watches, gold, or diamonds and prefer not to sell permanently
Customers without access to traditional credit or bank loans who can use collateral-based borrowing
Luxury watch and jewelry buyers seeking authenticated pre-owned or consigned high-end items
People seeking to sell unwanted luxury items for quick cash without auction delays
diagnosis: Queens Center Pawn Brokers is best for people in immediate need of cash who own high-value luxury items (watches, gold, diamonds) and want a fast collateral-based loan or quick sale without traditional lending requirements. The critical caveat: the website provides zero disclosure of loan terms, interest rates, fees, or redemption policies—all essential details must be obtained directly from the shop before entering any transaction, as these factors determine the true cost of borrowing.
services: Collateral-based loans (pawning) against watches, gold, diamonds, and jewelry
Cash purchases of luxury watches, gold, diamonds, silver, and antiques
Retail sales of authenticated luxury watches and jewelry through physical store
Online e-commerce store for purchasing luxury items
Rolex and high-end watch sales and authentication
Gold and diamond jewelry buying and selling
18k gold chains, bracelets, and rings sales
Special order and custom request services
Promotional discounts on purchases (e.g., $100 off with code 'QCB')
